scripts.build-front: magick -density 300 cards/ckyc_card_front.svg -background white -alpha remove -alpha off -bordercolor white -border 5 assets/images/ckyc_card_front.png
scripts.build-back: magick -density 300 cards/ckyc_card_back.svg -background white -alpha remove -alpha off -bordercolor white -border 5 assets/images/ckyc_card_back.png
scripts.merge-png: magick assets/images/ckyc_card_front.png assets/images/ckyc_card_back.png -background white -gravity center -bordercolor white -border 20 +append assets/images/ckyc_card_output.png
scripts.publish: npm run build-front && npm run build-back && npm run merge-png
